title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama local server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI) with multi-user support, code highlighting, RAG, and more.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper that adds conversation history, markdown rendering, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight retrieval-augmented generation pipeline using Ollama for embeddings and chat, with ChromaDB as vector store.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama providing synchronous/asynchronous APIs and Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Qt-based desktop GUI for chatting with Ollama models, packaged for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Unofficial Nim language wrapper for the Ollama REST API with async HTTP and JSON streaming.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection.

title: ollama-models
summary: Curated collection of community-submitted Modelfiles for Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, and niche fine-tunes.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed and model auto-pull.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models in any channel or DM.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.
